name: dcc_node_graph_workflow
description: 通用 DCC 节点图工作流：适用于所有节点图操作（UE 蓝图、SD 材质、UE 材质）。 核心思路：先写伪代码，再映射节点，再创建连接。 Use when AI needs to: build any node graph (Blueprint/SD/UE Material) from scratch or add complex logic to an existing graph. Activate BEFORE the DCC-specific skill to plan the approach, then switch to the specific skill for API details.
author: ArtClaw
